page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6.4xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.g6 server family. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor operating at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The instance features 16 dedicated vCPUs and 64.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 5 Gbps.

Benchmark data reveals a performance profile characterized by average multi-core capabilities alongside weaker single-core execution. In stress-ng testing, single-core CPU performance falls into the bottom 25%, and single-threaded gzip compression is similarly limited. However, multi-core performance scales to average levels, as demonstrated by a multi-core stress-ng score of 13974.04 and a Passmark CPU score of 15381.15. Memory bandwidth is stable, with cached small-block reads reaching 779.61 GB/sec and uncached large-block reads at 89.18 GB/sec.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.g6.4xlarge offers a balanced resource density suitable for workloads that require moderate, multi-threaded compute power without the premium cost of memory-optimized or compute-optimized tiers. It is well-suited for general-purpose applications, including static web serving, multi-threaded decompression tasks, Redis caching layers, and medium-scale database operations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance from the ecs.g6 family, equipped with 16 dedicated vCPUs and 64.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz, it features a balanced 1:4 resource ratio. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps. Performance benchmarks indicate a clear tradeoff: single-core performance and single-threaded compression tasks are relatively weak, falling into the bottom 25%, while multi-core operations, memory bandwidth, and database operations perform at average levels. This resource profile makes the ecs.g6.4xlarge a cost-efficient option for balanced, multi-threaded workloads such as static web serving, Redis caching, and general-purpose database hosting.
